<!-- For changes to the Professional Calculator subproject. -->

## What & why

<!-- Summarize the change and the motivation. Link any issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / chore / refactor

## Numerical correctness

<!-- Required for any change to math/. -->

- [ ] Added/updated tests anchored to a **closed-form value or invariant**
- Anchors used (e.g. `Γ(1/2)=√π`, `det(AB)=det A·det B`, put–call parity):
  -

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` is clean (strict)
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` meets the gates (85% lines / 80% branches)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies
- [ ] No `eval` / `Function`
- [ ] Docs updated (README / COMPLEXITY / CHANGELOG) if behavior changed
